title: Vietnam's Delight Reborn
description: This is a rework of Vietnam's Delight and with some more features in the future.
body:
# Introduction - First of all, at v1 it will be a rework of [Vietnam's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vietnamsdelight) of Zach's room along with fixing some bugs and port to NeoForge. We asked for his permission to continue develop the mod and he gave us the permission. - Secondly, we're planning some more features with we don't know when it will be done because at the end of the day, it is still a hobbie project. # Vietnam's Delight An add-on for Farmer's Delight that add foods (and other items) from Vietnam.
EMI or equivalents is recommended. You are free to use this mod in your modpack as long as you give proper credit.
